initial_request_score.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: Structure of the ALS protein (encoded by the IGFALS gene) was evaluated
IGFALS mutations have been detected through clinical exome and confirmed by Sanger sequencing
Aim of the study is the use the AlphaFold artificial intelligence algorithm to predict the impact of novel mutations of the IGFALS gene
predict two IGFALS gene mutations initially classified as VUS, as potentially pathogenetic

issues.claim: Reclassification of the IGFALS variants from Variants of Uncertain Significance (VUS) to potentially pathogenetic
issues.reason: The explicit Aim is to 'predict the impact'. Reclassification is the Conclusion/Outcome, though highly implied as the objective of predicting impact on VUS.

initial_request_score.fix_suggestion: Change quantifiable_goal to 'Prediction of the structural and functional impact of IGFALS variants initially classified as VUS' to match the explicit Aim statement.

evidence.quote: Whole Exome Sequencing was performed using the Whole Exome Solutions kit by Sophia Genetics
mean depth of coverage 50×, with >98% regions at 25×... GRCh37/hg19... Illumina NextSeq 550
Two IGFALS variants were found in the proband
3500 DX DNA Sequencer (Life Technologies)
BigDye Terminator kit v3.1... Sequencing Analysis v5.4
segregation analysis demonstrated the paternal and maternal origin of the c.1349T>C and c.1363_1365delCTC variants, respectively
Agilent Human Genome CGH oligonucleotide array 180K
CGH array with negative results
AlphaFold artificial intelligence algorithm
model deposited in the AlphaFold human proteins database... AFP35858-F1-model_v1.pdb
13. J. Jumper... Nature 596... (2021)
mutated positions were found the concave side a horseshoe structure... likely interfering with protein-protein interactions
SIFT (https://sift.bii.a-star.edu.sg)
shows that the only tolerated amino acid at position 450 is leucine and few other residues could be tolerated at position 455
Structure of the ALS protein... was evaluated through the AlphaFold... reduced levels of the IGF1 and IGFBP-3 proteins... were detected
Height (cm) (SDS) 111.3 (-2.14)... IGF-1 (ng/ml) (SDS) 47 (-2.2 SD)... IGFBP3 341 ng/ml; -2.6 SD
by using the AlphaFold structure we were able to predict two IGFALS gene mutations initially classified as VUS, as potentially pathogenetic
